+ updateEvent(adminUserId: Long, eventId: Long, request: UpdateEventRequest) : EventResponse

- validateDatesAndPrice(startDateTime: OffsetDateTime, endDateTime: OffsetDateTime, basePrice: BigDecimal) : void
- resolveLocationForUpdate(event: Event, locationId: Long, locationRequest: EventLocationRequest) : Location
- notifyActiveReservationsAboutTimeChange(event: Event, previousStartDateTime: OffsetDateTime, previousEndDateTime: OffsetDateTime) : void
